calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Henry Glasser for and with Kay Bradner (Petitioner).

The Court raised concern about not waiting for the Franchise Tax Board (FTB) to file a claim. Mr. Glasser stated that there is practical reason to grant distribution now and reported that tax return have not been filed since 1991. The Court stated that the argument present is not convincing and that proper notice to FTB is required. The accounting petition was continued to May 22,2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
